To assign a custom hotkey, click the inp: To assign a custom hotkey, click the input box next to a tool and press your desired key combination (e.g., Ctrl+Shift+A). Click the × button to clear it. (If a combination is not registered, another app on your system may be blocking it.)

The editor is on, so image captures open: The editor is on, so image captures open straight in it and show this brief message. Video and GIF captures still use the notification you design on the right.
Every capture uses the notification you: Every capture uses the notification you design on the right. If you turn the editor on, image captures will open in it and show the message on the left instead.

Free web translation engine — always ava: Free web translation engine — always available, no API key or setup needed. Decent quality for common language pairs.
